title: Stockpile
description: Adds 7 enchants, a rework and an axe to Arsenal
body:
**Twas is an addon for Arsenal'**

# Scythe enchants

### Infectious:
  Applies a debuff both to you and the enemy,
The debuff increases the next damage taken by 50% (excluding using it for Spewing)

### Clutch:
  ~~is this some kind of anton, blast?~~
  Using the Scythe will increase your speed and make you dash forward
Repeated uses need timing, indicated by 2 exclamation marks appearing on your GUI

# Throwing axe

Can be found on husks. Gets thrown in an arc.
You can retrieve the axe by hitting it with an anchorblade or getting near it.
### Recall:
  The axe now gets thrown in a straight line and turns back after a certain point. It also now pierces enemies instead of bouncing off of them.

### Sanguine:
  Axe (the item) no longer gets thrown when using it. Instead, the player gains 3 regeneration debt.


#  Anchorblade enchants

### Unchained:
  Upon hitting a block or reaching it's distance limit, instead of returning to you, the anchor will turn into a separate bouncing projectile.
Also, it pierces enemies.
### Revolving:
  Instead of immidiately throwing the anchor, it first spins around you
  Like a beyblade hehehoho
  It'll also lower your gravity
  After 8 seconds or if you try to recall the anchor, it will be thrown as usual.
### Whirling:
  ~~Like whirling in rags from Disco elysium, , .,..~~
  The anchor drags everything it hits along with it when going forward.
  And backward.

  
# Spewing Rework
  Spewing now gives you 5 regeneration debt instead of dealing 3 damage.
  You cannot regenerate until the debt is 0. Any and all healing before that will lower the debt.
  All debt taken after 20 will instead deal damage.
